CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DALRIN LEWIS' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement.

Plaintiff Dalrin Lewis's unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative [PAGA] Action Settlement is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court: (1) preliminary approves of the proposed Class Action and PAGA Settlement Agreement ("Settlement"); (2) preliminarily approves payment of the Gross Settlement Amount of $338,883.06; (3) conditionally certifies the proposed Class for settlement purposes only; (4) appoints Plaintiff as the Class Representative; (5) preliminarily approves a service award to Plaintiff of $7,500; (6) preliminarily approves the PAGA provisions of the Settlement; (7) appoints Koul Law Firm, APLC, and Bibiyan Law Group, P.C., as Class Counsel; (8) preliminarily approves a reasonable attorney's fees award subject to proof not to exceed $112,666.67 (not to exceed 1/3 of the Gross Settlement Amount); (9) appoints Phoenix Settlement Administrators to serve as the Settlement Administrator; (10) preliminarily approves payment to Phoenix not to exceed $9,500; (11) preliminarily approving reimbursement of costs to Class Counsel subject to proof not to exceed $30,000; (12) approves the use of the proposed notice procedure and related notice form; (13) directs that notice be sent to the Settlement Class; and (14) sets a final approval hearing date for October 29, 2025 at 9:00 am in this department, for which Plaintiff shall file a memorandum identifying and discussing outstanding issues no later than 10 court days before the hearing, with courtesy copy delivered to the department within 24 hours of filing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
